title: Oil Prices Cross $90 a Barrel as U.S.-Iran Conflict Widens
summary: Brent crude, the global benchmark for oil, rose more than 3 percent as trading resumed on Sunday, while S&P 500 futures remained essentially unchanged.

title: Federal Agents Were Told FBI Will No Longer Investigate ICE Confrontations
summary: Senior officials deny such a change is in the works, despite guidance shared with agents around the country in recent days.

title: Failed Immigration Cases Leave Chicago Prosecutor’s Office Reeling
summary: Prosecutors have fled the U.S. attorney’s office in Chicago, angry about the cases they’ve been told to bring against protesters and immigrants.

title: Man Killed by Truck After ICE Encounter in Florida Was Visiting From Mexico
summary: A Central Florida nonprofit group identified the man as Juan Jairo Coronilla Durán and said he had planned to return home to his family.

title: In Maine Senate Race, Jackson Sprints Ahead of Pack, as Bellows Drops Out
summary: Troy Jackson, a progressive, solidified his clear edge in the contest to replace Graham Platner, as Shenna Bellows, Jordan Wood and Nirav Shah ended their bids.

title: ‘Blue MAGA’ Has Entered the Chat
summary: It’s a term that can mean whatever the people using it want it to mean. But it’s not a compliment.

title: In Arizona’s Primaries, Democrats Fight Over a House Seat They Need Badly
summary: Democrats have a chance to flip a competitive battleground district in and around Scottsdale, but the winner of Tuesday’s primary will emerge bloodied and broke.

title: Misery in the Epicenter of Cyclospora: ‘A Baseball Bat to Your Abdomen’
summary: The debilitating malady has gripped Monroe County, Mich.

title: Before Lettuce Felled Thousands, a Cilantro-Linked Cyclospora Outbreak Sickened New Yorkers
summary: New York City health officials shared details of how they traced a much smaller cyclosporiasis outbreak, showing the difficulty of tracing contamination.

title: Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ Brings in $124.5 Million at the Box Office on Opening Weekend
summary: Christopher Nolan’s nearly three-hour epic was No. 1 over the weekend, with about $124.5 million in ticket sales in the United States and Canada.

title: ‘The Odyssey’ Review: Passion in Every Frame
summary: Few directors close the divide between the art film and the blockbuster like Christopher Nolan.

title: Christopher Nolan on ‘The Odyssey’ and IMAX Technical Challenges
summary: He and the cinematographer Hoyte van Hoytema combined new inventions (like fire-mimicking lights they developed) with century-old techniques.

title: Don’t Let This Useless Debate Distract You, Democrats
summary: A battle over idealized economic systems doesn’t help Democratic candidates.

title: It’s No Longer So Much Fun to Be MAGA in Washington
JD and Usha Vance Welcome Fourth Child
summary: In a post on social media, Mr. Vance said his wife and their son, Alec Neel Vance, were “happy and healthy.”
